\tzpentry{ID3832}{Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3832 introduces Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\mathcal{F}(t) = T^*(\mathrm{SO}(3)\times\mathbb{R}^3)\)
\]
